title: Amethyst Saturation
description: Changes the progress of amethyst clusters growth and allows you to distinguish different stages more easily
body:
This is a small but useful texture pack which visually changes the progress of amethyst clusters growth by desaturating earlier stages, which allows you to distinguish different stages a little easier.
![growth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35d18660ad7bd3575cba041098b54fdc09ba7be1.gif)
